title: NERC Seeks Inputs On Review Of Electricity Tariff
description: The Nigerian Electricity Regulatory (NERC) has urged stakeholders in the electricity sector to engage in a public response to the request for electricity Distribution Companies to raise electricity ta
html:
The Nigerian Electricity Regulatory (NERC) has urged stakeholders in the electricity sector to engage in a public response to the request for electricity Distribution Companies to raise electricity tariffs in the country.

Recall that the DisCos had last month advised Nigerians to buy bulk tariffs due to the looming increase of the tariff they said was necessary as the prevailing situation is making them operate at a loss.

The increase was supposed to be effected on July 1st, but it was suspended following an outcry and the non-approval of NERC before the advisory was made. NERC, in a statement, said that based on the 2023 Electricity Act and other extant rules, the 11 DisCos have filed an application for rate review with the commission.

It stated that the request was premised on the need to incorporate changes in macroeconomic parameters and other factors affecting the quality of service, operations and sustainability of the companies. “Accordingly, the commission hereby invites the general public for comments on the rate review applications by the distribution licensees,” it stated.
